blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
